generated_oml:
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer measuring temperature from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer measuring temperature from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensorC : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer measuring temperature from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensorA, DS18S20TemperatureSensorB, DS18S20TemperatureSensorC
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4ModelB
]

instance CalibrationParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibration parameters derived from experimental temperature data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_air, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool, RaspberryPi4ModelB
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool, RaspberryPi4ModelB
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ModelBasedSimulationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for data processing and actuator control"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ModelBasedSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationAlgorithmsService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares calibration of thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance PCBDesign : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for controlling heatbed and fan"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source hardware and software specifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables DocumentationService
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for heatbed and fan operation"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with dimensions 214 × 214 × 3 mm, driven by 4A current via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan operating at 12V/24V with airflow 0.02 m³/s, controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB"
]

instance ModelBasedSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based simulation for temperature prediction using calibrated models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetected, PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for system state variables"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationAlgorithmsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for system performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for adjusting system operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatbedPower, AdjustFanSpeed
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration using non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationParametersInsight
]

instance DocumentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Documentation and version control for hardware and software specifications"
    DTDFVocab:provides DocumentationInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected by monitoring system"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance optimization insight for system operation"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detected in system components"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state variables of the thermal system"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insight for system parameters"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from model simulation"
]

instance CalibrationParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration parameters for thermal models"
]

instance DocumentationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to open-source specifications and documentation"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedPower : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heatbed power based on temperature feedback"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed for optimal airflow"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system with styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ volume), heatbed (214 × 214 × 3 mm), fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20TemperatureSensorA, DS18S20TemperatureSensorB, DS18S20TemperatureSensorC, RaspberryPi4ModelB, PCBDesign, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to low-level driver, which acts on MOSFETs to control heatbed and fan based on bang-bang control parameters (UL, LL, H, C)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ server; components include controller, low-level driver, and simulation models communicating with PT through message queues; data flows from PT sensors to DT models and commands from DT to PT actuators as shown in Figure 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; DT integrates models post-deployment to monitor and optimize the physical system's operation, as stated in the abstract: 'once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin.'"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity tested via uniform temperature experiments (Assumption 1 validation); calibration using residual error minimization; Model B better predicts thermal inertia of heatbed compared to Model A; residual error minimized via Scipy's non-linear least squares solver."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data exchange between PT and DT; no specific protocol details beyond RabbitMQ usage, though RabbitMQ typically uses AMQP."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B; RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver all run on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in low-level driver to maintain device safety; control parameters (UL, LL) prevent overheating; MOSFETs and optocouplers decouple control signals from high-current driving circuits."
]
